Terms of Service

This is a publication draft. Final legal review is still required.

1. Product scope

Upscaler Studio is software licensed to the user under the final commercial terms of the published release.

2. License model

The website currently assumes a free trial path and a main paid Studio License. Final activation and entitlement logic must match the shipped product.

3. Payments and refunds

Replace with the real checkout provider, refund rules, and support obligations.

4. Third-party components

Do not claim exclusive rights over bundled third-party components where their own licenses apply.

EDITH Dev Studio

Publisher brand for Upscaler Studio and future premium Windows-first desktop software.
